title: STEPS OF BUILDING AN ARTIFICAL NEURAL NETWORK
author: Resul Mametsaliyev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The rapid introduction and targeted use of the achievements of science and technology are becoming the key to the future development of our society. In this regard, in the education system, there is a need of introducing new teaching methods into the educational process along with traditional teaching methods. In accordance with modern requirements, the priority of activity and quality indicators of training in harmony with the description of the theoretical and practical foundations of knowledge in the course have a special characteristic property.
